name: Democrats.org
subject: ✂️️ what Trump cuts ✂️️
body:

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cb5a/4067b0a/2d9cbf71e/7e7e0585/978529652/VEsO/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170319_dnc_nd&source=em_20170319_dnc_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cb5a/4067b0a/2d9cbf71e/7e7e0582/978529652/VEsP/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170319_dnc_nd&source=em_20170319_dnc_nd"). This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cb5a/4067b0a/2d9cbf71e/7e7e0580/978529652/VEsHBA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170319_dnc_nd&source=em_20170319_dnc_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Donald=20J=2E=20Trump?=
subject: Are you on board?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
I need you officially on our team. |

Friend, Our work didn’t end on Election Day. In fact, it’s just getting started. I need to know you’re committed to advancing an agenda that works for the American people. That’s why I’m asking you to accept/renew your Sustaining Membership for the 2017 year. With you on my team as an active member, NOTHING will stop our movement to Make America Great Again! Not fake news. Not the Democrats. NOTHING! Please contribute $250, $100, $65, $50, $35, $20, or $10 to accept your Sustaining Membership for the 2017 year. Together, we’ve started a movement that will last through the next four years and beyond. It’s time to step up and show your commitment to our cause. Accept your membership today. Thank you, Donald J. Trump President of the United States
ACCEPT YOUR MEMBERSHIP

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.
Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee.

name: Jill Vogel
subject: Spring is almost here!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Vogel for Virginia45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100Warrenton, VA 20186
body:
I need your help to bring new leadership to Richmond.
---
| | | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001T9t59a2ajEPDSN-iPOZn9PtNwFmph8Tfq5nLwA-7uF7fTuBq31-UEo4GrJix5Sc1VZ4C5DHSM3a6ltFRfLhh4mi5aE9OiEX4QG8P626t4jYXhIfSIBMTn1QOFvHwHyZDBTBsnb7sH3eccbKXz-ZG9vR4rVYoI5gMI2yH8KWe-aA9YF4e2j2uKYZ374ZHSkfUL7dQLTQj4MdY7z6ngOc32rU1MbBmEh4jJTAyec9ZpehkdMFBTfPsog==&c=Fh5VfTZja6ufDJFEv1Muy0WYyvPjag4XdVEWJWj3wuDCa2hxaCFAMA==&ch=ekZglZ7BCFPade-m8UIegBNX2s73wm8dyjHPTU7qjLKo4x-SZv-Tiw==)
---
| | |
---
| Peter,I hope you're having a great weekend and are spending time with friends and family. I don't know about you, but I'm thrilled to welcome the first day of Spring tomorrow and tell you that our Spring primary election is closing in and is less than three months away. This is an exciting time to spring forward, launch great plans and start to chart a new course of GROWTH for Virginia. Today I want to take a moment and ask you to start talking with your fellow Virginians about**the importance of getting Virginia back on track and growing again!** Getting government out of your life, out of your business, out of the regulatory environment and generally out of the way of progress.
---
| [If you agree chip in to get Virginia back on track today!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001T9t59a2ajEPDSN-iPOZn9PtNwFmph8Tfq5nLwA-7uF7fTuBq31-UEo4GrJix5Sc1VZ4C5DHSM3a6ltFRfLhh4mi5aE9OiEX4QG8P626t4jYXhIfSIBMTn1QOFvHwHyZDBTBsnb7sH3eccbKXz-ZG9vR4rVYoI5gMI2yH8KWe-aA9YF4e2j2uKYZ374ZHSkfUL7dQLTQj4MdY7z6ngOc32rU1MbBmEh4jJTAyec9ZpehkdMFBTfPsog==&c=Fh5VfTZja6ufDJFEv1Muy0WYyvPjag4XdVEWJWj3wuDCa2hxaCFAMA==&ch=ekZglZ7BCFPade-m8UIegBNX2s73wm8dyjHPTU7qjLKo4x-SZv-Tiw==)
---
| As I travel across the state on the campaign, I see how frustrated folks are with burdensome taxes and government overreach. As a small business owner and as a State Senator who represents a district that includes rural areas, I know how hard it is to succeed when the government over-taxes and over-regulates. And nothing impedes a growing economy faster taxes and regulations. As Lt. Governor, my number one priority will be to fight for a healthy economy and make sure government stays out of your way! **IF YOU AGREE THIS IS WHAT NEEDS TO BE DONE, PLEASE CONSIDER MAKING AN INVESTMENT IN MY CAMPAIGN BY CONTRIBUTING TODAY!**
---
| | | [CONTRIBUTE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001T9t59a2ajEPDSN-iPOZn9PtNwFmph8Tfq5nLwA-7uF7fTuBq31-UEo4GrJix5Sc1VZ4C5DHSM3a6ltFRfLhh4mi5aE9OiEX4QG8P626t4jYXhIfSIBMTn1QOFvHwHyZDBTBsnb7sH3eccbKXz-ZG9vR4rVYoI5gMI2yH8KWe-aA9YF4e2j2uKYZ374ZHSkfUL7dQLTQj4MdY7z6ngOc32rU1MbBmEh4jJTAyec9ZpehkdMFBTfPsog==&c=Fh5VfTZja6ufDJFEv1Muy0WYyvPjag4XdVEWJWj3wuDCa2hxaCFAMA==&ch=ekZglZ7BCFPade-m8UIegBNX2s73wm8dyjHPTU7qjLKo4x-SZv-Tiw==)
---
| Every dollar we raise helps us get out there and share with voters what I hope to accomplish. Please also take the time to learn more about my message by visiting my website and learning about what issues I think we need to focus on to make Virginia #1 again! [www.vogelforvirginia.com/issues](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001T9t59a2ajEPDSN-iPOZn9PtNwFmph8Tfq5nLwA-7uF7fTuBq31-UErT9yWJg0SffdvlafIzolE2F8bZS3lRwWe4sQwNsZF6q9tgF1B8J3fXEM5FOZ0EWvFDovVBcMGiPAXcwfo0U8v-fhx916yVuS3Xse0Yw2081oFCEClIZT_k=&c=Fh5VfTZja6ufDJFEv1Muy0WYyvPjag4XdVEWJWj3wuDCa2hxaCFAMA==&ch=ekZglZ7BCFPade-m8UIegBNX2s73wm8dyjHPTU7qjLKo4x-SZv-Tiw==) Enjoy your Sunday and thank you for your support,
---
| | |
---|---
|

| Jill Vogel[CLICK HERE TO SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001T9t59a2ajEPDSN-iPOZn9PtNwFmph8Tfq5nLwA-7uF7fTuBq31-UEo4GrJix5Sc1VZ4C5DHSM3a6ltFRfLhh4mi5aE9OiEX4QG8P626t4jYXhIfSIBMTn1QOFvHwHyZDBTBsnb7sH3eccbKXz-ZG9vR4rVYoI5gMI2yH8KWe-aA9YF4e2j2uKYZ374ZHSkfUL7dQLTQj4MdY7z6ngOc32rU1MbBmEh4jJTAyec9ZpehkdMFBTfPsog==&c=Fh5VfTZja6ufDJFEv1Muy0WYyvPjag4XdVEWJWj3wuDCa2hxaCFAMA==&ch=ekZglZ7BCFPade-m8UIegBNX2s73wm8dyjHPTU7qjLKo4x-SZv-Tiw==)
